name: The Elven Waystone
description: A slender pillar of white stone stands in a clearing, covered in flowing, vine-like carvings. It hums with a faint, melodic resonance.

waystone-initial.text: The magic here is old and deep. A small basin at the base of the stone is filled with crystal-clear rainwater.

choices.label: [Elf/Half-Elf] Recite the ancient greeting of the woods.
[Druid/Wizard] Attempt to attune to the stone's resonance.
Drink the water from the basin.

elven-blessing.text: The carvings glow with a soft green light as you speak. The forest seems to breathe with you, and your path ahead becomes clear.

arcane-attunement-check.success_text: You sync your own energy with the waystone. The resonance restores your magical focus.
arcane-attunement-check.failure_text: The resonance is too complex to grasp. The hum becomes a jarring discord.

mana-restore.text: Your mind feels sharp and energized.

arcane-fail.text: The magical backlash rattles your focus.

drink-water.text: The water is sweet and refreshing. You feel your fatigue melting away.

exit.text: The waystone continues its lonely hum as you depart.
